## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat:` / `fix:` / `docs:` / `chore:` / `test:` / `refactor:` / `ci:`)
- [ ] Commits are signed off with `git commit -s` (DCO)
- [ ] `make all` passes locally (or the containerised equivalent in `CONTRIBUTING.md`)
- [ ] Unit tests added or updated where relevant
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] `README.md` / `CLAUDE.md` updated if user-facing behaviour or architecture changed
